title: Smoky Portuguese Tagine Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew made with smoky pork, tender vegetables, and a blend of aromatic spices, inspired by the traditional Portuguese tagine.

ingredients.name: Portuguese tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most spice stores or online

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the pork cubes on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and chopped red bell pepper. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, Portuguese tagine spice blend, and browned pork. Stir to combine.
Add the chopped zucchini and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced olives and crusty bread on the side.
